name: architecture-analysis
description: Architectural dependency analysis and impact assessment. Use for: (1) Blast radius - who depends on a service, what breaks if I change it; (2) Dependency tree - what does a service depend on (ancestors/upstream); (3) Root cause analysis - find shared dependencies when multiple services fail; (4) Architecture metrics - coupling (density), depth (diameter), connectivity; (5) Domain discovery - identify module boundaries via cut vertices; (6) Hot services - critical infrastructure with many depe...
